story.iWant: to see my colleagues' photos with clear status indicators
story.soThat: I can instantly recognize who is speaking or listening

tasks.task: CSS Token Extensions for Avatar Status States - Add avatar-specific tokens to tokens.css, add speaking pulse animation keyframes, ensure tokens work across all 4 themes
Enhance UserAvatarPresence Props Interface - Add isSpeaking, isPresenting, isMuted, size props to UserAvatarPresence.tsx
Implement Status Ring Animations in UserAvatarPresence - Speaking glow with pulse, presenting solid border, muted dimmed opacity
Update ModernSpaceCard Avatar Section Layout - Negative margin overlap (-10px), reduce max visible to 4, z-index layering
Update Overflow Badge Styling - 36px circular badge matching avatar size, theme token styling
Add Hover Interactions to UserAvatarPresence - translateY(-3px) scale(1.1), z-index bump, enhanced tooltip with status
Theme Compatibility Testing - Test all 4 themes (Neon, Zen, Obsidian, Paper)
Accessibility Improvements - 44px touch target, screen reader status, focus ring, data-avatar-interactive
Unit Tests - Status props, animations, stacking, overflow badge, click-stop

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Enhanced UserAvatarPresence component with speaking, presenting, and muted states, preserving all existing functionality
Photo-first design with 36px circular avatars, 2px border inheriting from --vo-card-bg
Animated status rings: box-shadow glow for speaking (pulse 2s), solid border for presenting, dimmed opacity (0.5) for muted
Smart stacking with negative margin overlap (-10px), max 4 visible avatars, proper z-index layering
Overflow badge "+N" styled with --vo-pill-bg and --vo-pill-text tokens, positioned as last avatar
Hover interaction: translateY(-3px) scale(1.1), 0.2s ease transition, z-index bump, tooltip with name/role/status
Theme-aware styling: all colors from CSS variables, adapts to Neon, Zen, Obsidian, Paper themes

docs.doc: Source of truth for avatar constellation styling. Contains .avatar (36px, border, negative margin), .avatar:hover (transform), .avatar.speaking (box-shadow glow), .avatars-row container styles.
AvatarConstellation component spec: speaking/presenting/muted states, status ring animations, accessibility requirements.
Original acceptance criteria and technical reference for Avatar Constellation V2.
Previous story learnings: ModernSpaceCard is canonical, SpaceElement was removed, theme token patterns.
Click-stop protocol: data-avatar-interactive attributes required on UserAvatarPresence, parent guard patterns, portal menu handling.
EnhancedAvatarV2 is canonical display component. UserAvatarPresence uses it internally.

file.reason: PRIMARY FILE TO MODIFY. Current implementation with EnhancedAvatarV2, tooltip, status indicator, click-stop protocol (data-avatar-interactive).
file.currentFeatures: - Uses EnhancedAvatarV2 for avatar rendering - Tooltip with name, status, dev-mode ID - Status dot indicator (online/away/busy/offline) - Click-stop: data-avatar-interactive, onMouseDown stopPropagation
file.toAdd: - isSpeaking?: boolean - isPresenting?: boolean - isMuted?: boolean - size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' - Hover transform: translateY(-3px) scale(1.1) - Speaking glow animation - Presenting border - Muted opacity

file.reason: MODIFY avatar section. Uses AvatarGroup component. Update max visible avatars, stacking layout.
file.notes: Current: Uses AvatarGroup with max={isCinema ? 8 : isCompact ? 4 : 6} Story 3.3: Reduce to max 4 in default state, update overflow badge styling

file.reason: Avatar stacking component used by ModernSpaceCard. Already has negative margin overlap (-12px). May need adjustment to -10px per UX spec.
file.currentFeatures: - Negative margin overlap: marginLeft: -12px - Visible users slice with max prop - Overflow badge with +N count - Tooltip showing remaining user names

file.reason: Canonical avatar component used by UserAvatarPresence. Do not modify - use as-is.
EXTEND with avatar-specific tokens. Already has --vo-accent, --vo-pill-*, --vo-beacon-* for reference patterns.
May need vo-avatar-* utility classes for animation and styling.
Used for overflow count in AvatarGroup. May need styling updates for 36px circular.
Already used by UserAvatarPresence and AvatarGroup.
Type definition for user presence data with status field.

constraints.constraint: Click-Stop Protocol: UserAvatarPresence MUST have data-avatar-interactive attribute. onMouseDown must call stopPropagation(). Parent components guard against avatar clicks.
Anti-Duplication: MODIFY existing components (UserAvatarPresence, ModernSpaceCard, AvatarGroup). Do NOT create new files.
Strict TypeScript: Provide explicit types for all new props (isSpeaking, isPresenting, isMuted, size).
CSS Source of Truth: Extract avatar styling patterns directly from ux-space-grid-v2.html. This file is authoritative for sizes, transforms, animations.
Theme Token Naming: Use --vo-avatar-* prefix for new avatar tokens. Extend tokens.css, do not recreate.
EnhancedAvatarV2 is canonical: UserAvatarPresence uses EnhancedAvatarV2 internally. Do not create new avatar components.
Speaking/presenting props are manual: Real voice detection (VAD) is out of scope. Parent components pass status props.
Performance: Animations must maintain 60 FPS with 12+ avatars visible.

tests.standards: Use Vitest as the test framework with React Testing Library for component tests. Follow existing patterns in __tests__/theme-system.test.tsx and __tests__/enhanced-avatar-v2-simple.test.tsx. Mock contexts as needed. Use vi.fn() for mock functions.

ideas.idea: Test UserAvatarPresence renders with new status props (isSpeaking, isPresenting, isMuted)
Test backward compatibility: renders correctly without new props
Test avatar renders at 36px size by default (md)
Test speaking state applies glow animation class/style
Test presenting state applies solid border
Test muted state applies dimmed opacity (0.5)
Test AvatarGroup limits visible avatars to 4 in default mode
Test negative margin overlap is applied (-10px)
Test overflow badge displays correct "+N" count
Test overflow badge is styled with theme tokens
Test hover applies transform: translateY(-3px) scale(1.1)
Test tooltip shows name and status
Test avatar renders correctly in each theme (check CSS variable application)
Test click-stop protocol: clicking avatar stops propagation (data-avatar-interactive)
Test focus ring visible on keyboard navigation
Test aria-label includes status when speaking/presenting/muted
